title: Anonymous, no-PII feedback channel + outcome instrumentation
context: An anonymous, no-PII feedback channel and outcome instrumentation for ewing-survivorship-late-effects, upholding the no-data-collection stance: anonymous only, no profiling analytics, no accounts, no health intake. It measures attested usefulness and reach, not engagement, and stores no identifiable data.
objective: Build an anonymous, no-PII feedback channel + outcome instrumentation measuring attested usefulness without profiling.
acceptanceCriteria: Feedback is anonymous with no PII collected; no accounts and no health intake
No profiling analytics; instrumentation captures attested usefulness and reach, not engagement tracking
No identifiable data stored or logged; privacy stance verified in tests
output: packages/feedback: anonymous no-PII feedback channel + outcome instrumentation
